title: Defrost diagnostics
subtitle: Traces the defrost signal from Home Assistant through normalization to the detection engine. Use this to see why a cycle was or wasn't detected.
noMappings: No defrost entities are mapped yet.

problem.entity_not_found: The defrost entity is not present in Home Assistant.
problem.evaluation_disabled: Defrost-aware evaluation is turned off for this unit.
problem.entity_unavailable: The defrost entity is currently unavailable or unknown.
problem.normalization_failed: Home Assistant reports the state "{{raw}}", which is not on/off. Add a value mapping below so it can be recognized.

mapping.title: Defrost state mapping
mapping.hint: Comma-separated raw states. Use this when the controller reports values other than on/off (e.g. a Dixell coil).

mode.label: Diagnostics mode
mode.adminOnly: Administrator only. Auto-expires; logs are redacted (no tokens/secrets).

logs.title: Structured logs
logs.empty: Enable diagnostics mode to collect structured logs.
